_note: ERPNext/Frappe ships submittable documents that already have an implicit docstatus lifecycle (Draft -> Submitted -> Cancelled). Named approval Workflows are OPTIONAL and configured per site via the Workflow DocType; the examples below are typical/representative configurations described in the official workflow docs (https://docs.frappe.io/erpnext/workflow). Roles shown are conventional ERPNext role names. The Leave Application example is from the Frappe HR app.

docstatusModel.0: Draft - editable, not yet posted to ledgers
docstatusModel.2: Cancelled - reversed side-effects (on_cancel); a cancelled doc can be Amended into a new draft (copy with incremented amendment suffix)
docstatusModel.submitFlow: save (draft) -> submit (docstatus 1) -> optionally cancel (docstatus 2) -> optionally amend (new draft linked via amended_from)
docstatusModel.workflowRelation: Each Workflow Document State maps to a doc_status (0/1/2). Reaching a state whose doc_status=1 submits the document; a state with doc_status=2 cancels it. The workflow_state field stores the human-readable state; transitions are gated by 'allowed' role and an optional Python condition expression.

workflows.name: Sales Order Approval (representative)
workflows.purpose: Require manager sign-off on customer orders, optionally above a value threshold, before they are submitted and acted upon.

workflows.name: Purchase Order Approval (representative)
workflows.purpose: Multi-level procurement approval; high-value POs can require an additional approver via a transition condition (e.g. grand_total > threshold).

workflows.name: Journal Entry Approval (representative)
workflows.purpose: Maker-checker control over manual accounting entries before they post to the GL.

workflows.name: Leave Application Approval (Frappe HR)
workflows.purpose: Route employee leave requests to the designated leave approver/manager before they are submitted and deducted from balance.

workflows.name: Expense Claim Approval (Frappe HR)
workflows.purpose: Approve employee reimbursement claims before posting the accounting entry.

workflows.name: Material Request Approval (representative)
workflows.purpose: Gate internal purchase/stock requests behind a stock or purchase manager before they become purchase orders.
